ddls:
CREATE TABLE "backlinks" (
  "backlink_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backlink */,
  "url" TEXT /* Target URL of the backlink */,
  "ip" TEXT /* IP address of the referring domain */,
  "refdomain" TEXT /* Referring domain that contains at least one link to the target */,
  "all" INTEGER /* Set to true for referring domains that contain at least one backlink to the target */,
  "text" INTEGER /* Set to true for referring domains that contain at least one text backlink to the target */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the backlink */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the backlink was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the backlink */,
  "link_quality" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the backlink */,
  "anchor_text" TEXT /* Text used in the backlink (if it's a text link) */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of the backlink (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the backlink (e.g., active, broken, redirected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backlink_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backlinks_refdomain FOREIGN KEY ("refdomain") REFERENCES refdomains ("refdomain_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backlinks_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refdomains" (
  "refdomain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referring domain */,
  "refdomain_name" TEXT /* Name of the referring domain */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the referring domain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the referring domain was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the referring domain */,
  "domain_authority" INTEGER /* Score indicating the authority of the referring domain */,
  "page_rank" INTEGER /* Page rank of the referring domain */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the referring domain (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refdomain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the client account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the client account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the client's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the client account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan the client is on (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who set the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., new link, lost link, link quality change) */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the alert (e.g., number of new links) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  "last_triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "trigger_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the alert has been triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Audit Trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "backlink_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backlink that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the changes */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
